title: NBTpack
body:
NBTpack is a resource pack that aims to make Minecraft feel fresh while also keeping the vanilla style.

It's full of changes - ranging from color tweaks, through animations, variants and fixed, ending on while remakes of some of the things.

This resource pack may seem rather small, but I assure you, it is just at the first glance. NBTpack affects almost every aspect of Minecraft.

If you are looking for a more comprehensive guide on what has been changed, take a look at interavtive changelogs included in NBTpack files. There you will find almost every of the most noticible changes of NBTpack

Download NBTpack for Java

TERMS OF USE

Readme listed inside of NBTpack file is outdated as for now - modrinth link is considered an official link

By playing with NBTpack, or any of its Plugins you agree to observe the rules written in TOU
If you did anything that breaks TOU now, but back then it wasn't there, then that rule break doesn't matter
If you wouldn't like to accept the rules of TOU, stop using this pack and delete it from your drive

As a player / resource pack maker / writer you're allowed to:

  • Play with resource pack
  • Share resource pack to other players with mention of author and link to the official download page
  • Use pack as inspiration for your pack, but need to mention this pack as inspiration*
  • Modify the pack for personal use if modifications don't break the rules of server if using in multiplayer
  • Create fan-made plugins


As a player / resource pack maker / writer you're NOT allowed to:

  • Share resource pack while claiming to be an author
  • Share resource pack using download soucre other than planetminecraft, curseforge or modrinth links
  • Use pack content and distribute edited / your pack as your own
  • Use pack content and distribute edited / your pack even if original author in mentioned
  • Use pack to hide multiplayer server's rule-breaking functionalities (such as x-ray)
  • Modify the pack and distribute as your own
  • Modify the pack and distribute even if original author in mentioned
  • Monetize the pack or earn money by using it**
  • Add watermarks to any pack content***
  • Using, sharing pack or acting in any way that may or to make people think pack is yours****
  • Redistribute parts of the core pack as separated fan-made plugins



*Using NBTpack textures to create your own is meant as inspiration and using pack assets and almost completly identical textures is not meant as inspiration
**Except for the videos or live streams where you're just plaing with NBTpack enabled and advertisements on website with article about pack, if the article is not breaking other TOU rules
***"Pack content" is understand as every file contained in any of official NBTpack zipped files
****If people think pack is yours and it's not your fault, you just should clarify you're not the author

NBTpack 4th Anniversary Special

NBTpack Legacy is a faithful recreation of the very first changes made at the beginning of the project, up until now, mostly lost to time.
Available for Minecraft Java Edition only.

Download Now

NBTpack Official Plugins

Are you enjoying pure NBTpack? If yes, then why not to check out official Plugins! Plugins are sort of an addon for NBTpack, but they will work separately. Keep in mind you will need a specific order to make all of them work. Or you can just use Ultimate Collection edition!

Download Now

How to Install
  1. Open Minecraft game and head to Options -> Resource Packs.
  2. Click Open Packs Folder.
  3. Put downloaded file there.
  4. You're ready to play with the pack once you select it in the game.

Summary

NBTpack is a resource pack that aims to provide brand new Minecraft experience while sticking to the vanilla theme. Some of the changes are more drastic and some not, but everything is themed around clear Minecraft. If you're looking for a pack that doesn't change the feel of the game, then congratulations. You just found it! Resource pack changes and adds things such as:

  • Snowier snow
  • White grass and foliage on snowy biomes
  • Taller wheat
  • New armor
  • Lot of cool effects icons
  • Even cooler GUIs
  • Beautiful panorama
  • Update name instead of Java Edition splash
  • Connectable bookshelf
  • Diminishing tools
  • Better shield perspective
  • Better shield banners
  • Epic Bad Omen and Hero of the Village icons
  • Lots of animated stuff
  • Lots of variants for many things
  • Better prismarine colors
  • Better looking torches
  • Hopper direction and lock indicator
  • Mob beds
  • Better colored minerals
  • Many easter eggs
  • Colorfull connection status icons
  • Green scaffolding
  • Tons of new splash texts
  • And much, much more!

Made by:
